label: PancakeSwap V3 range watch
description: Poll a PancakeSwap V3 pool's current tick and compare to your position's tick range. The step **completes** when the current tick moves **outside** the position range (i.e. concentrated liquidity is no longer active). Save the drift direction ('above' or 'below') to a variable for downstream branching. Use in always-on workflows to trigger rebalancing or exit logic. Works with any V3-style (Uniswap fork) concentrated liquidity pool on BSC.

inputs.description: V3 position NFT token ID. Template vars supported.
How often to check the current tick (default 30s).
Maximum wait time (0 = wait forever until out of range).

outputs.description: Row variable: 'above' (tick rose past tickUpper) or 'below' (tick fell past tickLower).
Row variable: current tick at the time drift was detected.
Row variable: JSON with tickLower, tickUpper, currentTick, direction, pool, token0, token1, fee.

formSchema.label: V3 position NFT token ID
formSchema.hint: The token ID from a previous v3PositionMint step.
